question: Chapters
feedback: The text does not list the main chapters or sections of the thesis itself. It only provides a project timeline (development plan) which lists milestones and tasks, but not the structural outline of the final document.

question: Description
feedback: While the text describes the problem statement and the relevance of the topic very well, it does not provide a brief description of what will be contained in each specific chapter of the thesis.

question: Structure
feedback: The general structure of the thesis (e.g., Introduction, Literature Review, Methodology, Comparative Analysis, Conclusion) is not explicitly presented. The reader can understand the research goals, but not the logical flow of the written chapters.
